description: Wave 1 - M10 Operations and Maintenance: Implement SQLite storage, event/audit store, cloud outbox, health monitoring, config versioning, and local REST API. Branch: feat/m10-ops-maintenance
steps: Create branch feat/m10-ops-maintenance from main
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/migrations.go with schema migration management
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/store.go with SQLite WAL connection management
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/store_test.go testing WAL mode, connection, graceful close
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/events.go implementing event CRUD: InsertEvent, GetEvent, ListEvents, AckEvent, ResolveEvent
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/events_test.go
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/audit.go implementing audit log: InsertAudit, ListAudits
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/audit_test.go
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/outbox.go implementing cloud outbox: Enqueue, Dequeue, MarkSent, GetPending, GetDepth
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/outbox_test.go testing transactional insert and dequeue
Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/config.go implementing config version store

Create services/gateway-server/internal/storage/sqlite/schema.sql with all tables: events, occupancy_states, equipment_states, safety_decisions, actuation_results, audit_logs, cloud_outbox, config_versions, users
Create services/gateway-server/internal/cloud/outbox/sync.go with exponential backoff sync logic
Create services/gateway-server/internal/cloud/outbox/sync_test.go
Create services/gateway-server/internal/observability/health.go with hardware/SSD/network health collection
Create services/gateway-server/internal/observability/health_test.go
Create services/gateway-server/internal/httpapi/router.go with local REST API routes matching docs/GATEWAY_PRODUCT_SPEC.md section 19
Create services/gateway-server/internal/httpapi/handlers.go with handler implementations
Create services/gateway-server/internal/httpapi/router_test.go testing route registration
Create services/gateway-server/internal/auth/rbac.go with role-based access control (USER, OPERATOR, MAINTAINER)
Create services/gateway-server/internal/auth/rbac_test.go testing permission enforcement
Ensure all time stored as UTC
Ensure event ID uniqueness enforced
Ensure outbox uses transactional insert with event
Run make build and make test
Commit all changes
acceptance_criteria: SQLite WAL mode is configured correctly
All tables from schema match GATEWAY_PRODUCT_SPEC section 17
Event store enforces unique event IDs
Outbox transactionally inserts with event storage
RBAC enforces role permissions matching ROLE_MODE_SPEC
Local API routes match GATEWAY_PRODUCT_SPEC section 19
